zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena Standish於1485年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Robert Standish1歲，母親Margaret Croft-1歲。她於1505年與Sir William Fleetwood a Knight在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年2月26日在英國英格蘭享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena Standish于1485年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Robert Standish1岁，母亲Margaret Croft-1岁。她于1505年与Sir William Fleetwood a Knight在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年2月26日在英国英格兰享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena Standish was born in 1485, in England, her father, Sir Robert Standish, was 1 and her mother, Margaret Croft, was -1. She married Sir William Fleetwood a Knight in 1505, in Standish, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 26 February 1540, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ko.lifeSummary: Helena Standish(이)가 1485년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Standish(은)는 1세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Croft(은)는 -1세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Sir William Fleetwood a Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 2월 26일 영국 잉글랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
